ORDER granting Plaintiff's  17   Motion to Remand. Remand is effective 14 days after the date of this order. Each party will bear their own fees and costs.  Per LCR 3(i), case will be remanded on the 15th day following the date of this Order, on 5/20/2026.  Signed by U.S. District Judge John C. Coughenour. (KRA)

RESPONSE, by Defendant KalshiEX LLC, to 17 MOTION to Remand . (Fogg, Steven) (Entered: 04/27/2026)

ORDER granting Parties'  19  Stipulated Motion to Extend the Time for Defendant to Respond to Complaint and Other Case Deadlines. Defendant's response to the State's Complaint shall become due 21 calendar days after this Court's o rder on the State's  17  Motion to Remand. Rule 26(f) conferencing, initial disclosures, and other case deadlines set by this Court shall be deferred pending resolution of the Motion to Remand.   Signed by U.S. District Judge John C. Coughenour.  (KRA)
